title: cytisus angulatus
intro: Cytisus angulatus, also known as the Angle-leaved Broom or Angle Broom, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea and dyspepsia, due to its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cytisus angulatus include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and act as an antispasmodic agent. Cytisus angulatus can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
